ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "version_num" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "pf_visualised" INTEGER /* Indicates if predictive factors were visualized */,
  "rrt_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if risk reduction techniques were used */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the experiment in seconds */,
  "percent_explored" REAL /* Percentage of the experiment that was successfully explored */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the experiment */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the experiment */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment in which the incident occurred */,
  "time_of_incident" REAL /* Time at which the incident occurred, in minutes */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths resulting from the incident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., chemical spill, equipment malfunction) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_incidents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_reduction_techniques" (
  "rrt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk reduction technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk reduction technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk reduction technique */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the risk reduction technique (e.g., personal protective equipment, safety protocols) */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the risk reduction technique (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rrt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, safety officer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the experiment */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the experiment */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the experiment result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment mapped to a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the experiment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES experiment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_category_mapping_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which this version applies */,
  "version_num" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update for this version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reporting_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES safety_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_safety_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which this metric applies */,
  "safety_score" REAL /* Safety score of the experiment (percentage) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the experiment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "compliance_status" INTEGER /* Compliance status of the experiment (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_safety_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which this recommendation applies */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, implemented, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_items" (
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action item */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which this action item applies */,
  "action_item_text" TEXT /* Text of the action item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action item (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the action item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
